title: instance.contact_account returns null
description: Both /api/v1/instance and /api/v2/instance should return a real Account object for contact_account, not null. Clients display this on About screen. v1: contact_account field, v2: contact.account nested field.
close_reason: N/A: Broadside has no Mastodon client API (/api/v1/instance, /api/v2/instance do not exist). Only NodeInfo 2.0 is served, which has no contact_account field per spec. Not a bug — architectural scope difference.
